source: Chen & Vinals, Phys Rev E 60, 559 (1999); PRL 79, 2670 (1997)

c005_capillary.match: YES — square in capillary regime exactly as predicted

c005_mixed.result: non-square; square is not selected; theta_r=61deg region active
c005_mixed.match: YES (qualitative) — leaves square regime where predicted; exact hexagon/8-fold ID needs longer CI run

verdict: GREEN (capillary square) / GREEN-qualitative (mixed leaves square) — c005 reproduces the Chen-Vinals phase-diagram structure
note: c005 is a DIRECT PDE simulation, not the amplitude-equation reduction; agreement with Chen-Vinals' independent amplitude-equation phase diagram is a strong cross-method check
